topic: Water footprint of foods
image_prompt: SVG: bar chart 'Volume of water needed to produce 1 kg of food'. y-axis 'Volume of water / l' 0 to 16000 (ticks every 1000), x-axis 'Food' (categorical). Ascending teal bars: Tomato 214, Broccoli 283, Orange 533, Apple 822, Peach 910, Tofu 2513, Cheese 3178, Egg 3920, Chicken 4325, Butter 5553, Pork 5998, Beef 15415, each labelled with its value.

topic: Question 1a — text only mis-crop
Elephant thermal image (homeostasis)
image_prompt: SVG: thermal-imaging recreation of an elephant on dark blue background. Body and ears warm (yellow/orange), trunk hot, legs/feet cooler (green/blue). Vertical colour scale at right from 34 C (warm white) down to 14 C (cool blue). Labels: 'Ear: warm — radiates heat'; 'Legs/feet: cooler'.

topic: Maple leaf and saguaro cactus (surface area comparison)
image_prompt: SVG: side-by-side panels. LEFT — a single large green maple leaf (5 lobes, veins) on a forest-floor background; label 'Maple leaf — large surface area'. RIGHT — three vertical saguaro-cactus columns with dark spines on a warm desert sky; label 'Saguaro cactus — small surface area (spines)'.

topic: Surface area to volume ratio cubes & table
image_prompt: SVG: three blue isometric cubes with side lengths 1, 3, 5 and a 3-row table beneath. Rows shaded yellow/pink/blue. Total surface area: 6, 54, 150. Total volume: 1, 27, 125. SA:V ratio: 6, 2, 1.2.

topic: North Pacific Ocean food web
image_prompt: SVG: North Pacific food web. Phytoplankton (bottom) -> Krill, Copepods; -> Pacific herring; Pacific herring -> Chinook salmon, Pacific halibut, Resident killer whale; Armhook squid -> Resident killer whale; Chinook salmon/Pacific halibut -> Resident killer whale. Seven species drawn. 'Not to scale' note.

topic: Ancient bristlecone pine — over 5000 years old
image_prompt: SVG: gnarled twisted bristlecone pine with weathered exposed-wood trunk and small green foliage clusters, rocky slope and blue sky behind.

topic: Tree height 135 cm + cross section showing circumference
image_prompt: SVG: LEFT tree with 135 cm height marker on trunk. RIGHT tree-trunk cross section with growth rings, dashed blue 'circumference' outline.

topic: Diameter formula + sycamore notebook (growth factor 1.57)
image_prompt: SVG: TOP cross-section with red diameter line and dashed circumference; formula 'diameter = circumference / pi' = 100 cm / pi = 31.83 cm. BOTTOM sycamore tree + magnifier with leaf + spiral notebook 'Species: Sycamore, Growth factor: 1.57'.

topic: Tree cross section with light/dark rings callout + method
image_prompt: SVG: cross section with alternating light/dark rings + magnified inset + callouts 'Light rings show spring and summer growth', 'Dark rings show autumn growth'. Method box: cut at 30 cm from base, count dark rings.

topic: Earth globe + temperate vs tropical tree cross sections
image_prompt: SVG: Earth globe with callouts to two tree cross sections. Temperate climate — many clear rings. Tropical climate — few/no visible rings.

topic: Sycamore tree icon
image_prompt: SVG: a single sycamore tree with full green canopy and brown trunk on white background. Label 'Sycamore tree'.

topic: Random sampling — 20 sycamores from forest
image_prompt: SVG: legend ('Sycamore tree' green canopy + 'Selected sycamore tree' red canopy) and a rectangular forest quadrat filled with many green canopies; exactly 20 trees are red (the random sample).

topic: Paper-helicopter Step 2 & 3 apparatus
image_prompt: SVG: TWO panels. Step 2 — folded paper helicopter held by hand, paperclip on bottom. Step 3 — person on chair beside vertical 1 m/2 m scale lining up helicopter at top.

topic: Step 4 stopwatch + drop scene + data table

image_prompt: SVG: three maple seed pods showing small (narrow V), medium and large (nearly horizontal) wing angles. Brown stem, kernels, yellow/green wing membranes.

topic: Question 6 design prompt — text only mis-crop
Osmosis across cell membrane
image_prompt: SVG: LEFT cell with nucleus + 'Cell membrane' label. RIGHT magnified inset — vertical phospholipid bilayer; inside (left) many red solute particles, outside (right) few; blue arrow shows net water movement low->high solute. Labels 'Inside (high solute)', 'Outside (low solute)', 'Solute particles'.

topic: Reverse osmosis schematic 1-4 + pumping seawater scene
image_prompt: SVG: TOP four-step schematic — (1) Pumping seawater, (2) Reverse osmosis (building + vessel + pylons), (3) Waste saltwater, (4) Storing and delivering water (tank + tap), connected by blue pipes with flow arrows. BOTTOM underwater pumping scene — intake pipe with grille, fish, seaweed, starfish.

topic: Reverse osmosis vessel + waste-saltwater tanker truck
image_prompt: SVG: TOP vessel with Pressure arrow on plunger pushing saltwater against orange semipermeable membrane into freshwater on the right. BOTTOM silver tanker truck on grass dumping waste saltwater from a black pipe; salty soil and wilted vegetation around discharge.

topic: Storing and delivering water — tank + sink with taps
image_prompt: SVG: cylindrical storage tank connected by blue pipes (with arrows) to a stainless-steel sink basin and two brass taps running water. Captions '4 Storing and delivering water' and 'The freshwater is treated further, stored and delivered'.

topic: Water cycle diagram
image_prompt: SVG: water cycle landscape with sun, white clouds, dark rain cloud, snow-capped mountains, river to lake, hills. Orange arrows + pill labels 'Precipitation', 'Collection', 'Evaporation', 'Condensation'.
